api_key.description: Klaus API key. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Klaus API base URL override for tests or proxies.

account.description: Klaus account id (integer). Required for every stream; account-scoped paths are /account/{account}/<resource>.

workspace.description: Klaus workspace id (integer). Required only for the categories stream, which is workspace-scoped (/account/{account}/workspace/{workspace}/categories).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
